extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco attacked with 29km remaining on the second section of La Redoute after riding Pidcock off his wheel, winning solo by over a minute
tactical_patterns: TRATNIK Jan's long solo effort from altitude training forced Quick-Step to ride motorbike tempo, exhausting potential rivals before decisive climb
EVENEPOEL attacked on second Redoute section (new right-turn route variant) not the summit, using different terrain than 2022 victory
Quick-Step sacrificed entire team before final 30km including ALAPHILIPPE, revealing Monument strategy prioritizes single protected rider over backup options
PIDCOCK refused to work when bridging to EVENEPOEL at Redoute start, tactical error allowing immediate counter-attack and isolation

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: went back-to-back solo, gap expanded to 90+ seconds indicating rivals couldn't organize chase even when given early warning
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: crashed out pre-race with wrist fractures, removed strongest counter-attacking threat before decisive phase
rider_signals.TRATNIK Jan: positive: altitude training paid immediate dividends with long solo breakaway forcing peloton work at critical moments
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: neutral: first Monument podium but tactical naivety refusing to collaborate at Redoute may have cost realistic winning chance
rider_signals.BUITRAGO Santiago: positive: third place career-best shows Quick-Step depth development, legitimate Monument podium threat emerging
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: second consecutive near-podium weekend suggests sustained Monument-level form, not one-off performance
rider_signals.GOOLAERTS David: negative: stomach problems forced early abandon, Quick-Step lost potential late-race support rider
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: stomach problems eliminated pre-race favorite, revealing vulnerability to race-day illness
